title: Mossel Bay hockey stick murder: accused back in court
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Xolani Manzi, accused of the 30-year-old Siphosethu Mdletshe's murder, made a brief appearance in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court on Tuesday 20 January.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Xolani Manzi, accused of the 30-year-old Siphosethu Mdletshe's murder, made a brief appearance in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court on Tuesday 20 January."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Mdletshe was beaten with a hockey stick in Dadoo Street, KwaNonqaba, in December and was declared dead on the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Manzi was arrested shortly after the incident took place and was granted bail in a previous court appearance.","html":"Manzi was arrested shortly after the incident took place and was granted bail in a previous court appearance."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The matter was postponed to Thursday 19 February.","html":"The matter was postponed to Thursday 19 February."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles: "},{"type":"list","items":["Man beaten to death, suspect arrested","Man accused of murder with hockey stick makes first court appearance"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Mossel Bay hockey stick murder: accused back in court
